method.notes: Global RCA uses approximate world total (6M papers/year). Internal RCA is fully self-consistent and preferred for cross-country comparison. Small countries (MNE, ALB, MKD) flagged as low confidence.

kruskal_wallis.description: Kruskal-Wallis H-test for RCA differences between geopolitical groups

spearman_rank.description: Spearman rank correlation between 2011 and 2020 RCA rankings
spearman_rank.interpretation: High (>0.7) means stable rankings across decade
